days.text: Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. A few showers at first. Force 3 to 4 southerly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. A few showers later. Force 4 to 5 south to southwesterly winds with gusts.
Cloudy. Occasional showers, heavy at times. Occasional thunderstorms. Force 3 to 4 southwesterly winds, becoming northerlies with gusts.
Cloudy. Occasional showers. A few thunderstorms. Force 3 to 4 north to northeasterly winds with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. A few showers. Force 2 to 3 east to northeasterly winds.
